transcript:
Hi, I'm Andrew, Solana Product Lead at Coinbase. It's great to be here today, building alongside everyone on Solana. Our mission at Coinbase is pretty simple: increase economic freedom in the world and bring the next billion people onchain. So, millions of assets are launching onchain every day. And we think that these should be accessible to all of our users. To enable this, we rolled out DEX trading on Coinbase. The same easy-to-use interface and app you may already be familiar with now allows you to trade any token on Solana. For our users, this means they get early access to millions of tokens, and they can trade these assets the moment they become available onchain. For issuers and builders, if your token has sufficient liquidity, this means you can be accessible to the millions of users on Coinbase without getting listed. So, we're really proud to bridge these worlds together for users and builders alike. Now, let's talk about why we're here. Coinbase is specifically expanding to Solana. Yes, this means very soon you'll be able to open up the Coinbase app and see native Solana assets on Coinbase, maybe even your own. So, with that, I'm going to pass the mic to Sabs and walk through a demo here.

Great, thank you Andrew. Hi everyone, I'm Sabs. I work on Solana integrations at Coinbase, including the upcoming DEX trading experience. So, let's start with a quick demo here. Uh, as you can see, this is the Coinbase retail app home screen. Uh, the most important thing to most traders and issuers is obviously trending assets. So, as you can see, we're going to click into trending here. We can now sort and filter by Solana. I'm going to click into Wojak. Gonna hit buy over here. And as you can see, the whole trading experience is identical to the standard CEX trading experience. You can pay with USDC, USD, your bank account, um, debit card. Everything's handled in the backend here, the slippage, um, you know, integrations with our routers. The order's been submitted. Now you can see it's popped up in our transactions page. And it's pending. We're going to click into it. You're going to see it confirm in a second. There you go. That simple. Now, as you can see, uh, we're going to go into our holdings and, you know, everything's together here. Your DEX assets, your Bitcoin, your CEX and DEX assets, everything's uh uh in the same page now. Uh, the the experience is essentially identical to what you're used to today uh with Coinbase. And yeah, uh one one last thing worth calling out. I'm sure you all have heard about our new Utopia acquisition. So, this is us signaling to you that, you know, we're going all in on Solana. There's going to be a lot new stuff like this coming out. This is just the start. Um, we're we're really excited to be part of this ecosystem uh and doubling down on Solana. So, yeah, with that, back to Andrew. Thank you very much everyone.

So, thank you. Uh, this is a wonderful moment. I'm excited. I hope you're excited. If you want to be first, go ahead and set your calendar for next week, December 17th. We'll have a product showcase where we're sharing more details. And, if you want to come find us here at Breakpoint to get exclusive access to a waitlist, please do so. Thank you so much for having us. You're phenomenal. We love Solana. Uh, thanks everyone.

# Coinbase Makes All Solana Tokens Accessible With New In-App DEX Upgrade
![Solana’s Bold “Hello Wall St.” Viral Ad Ignite Hype —Can SOL Hit $200 Next?](https://image.coinpedia.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/30170152/Solanas-Bold-Hello-Wall-St.-Viral-Ad-Ignite-Hype-%E2%80%94-Can-SOL-Hit-200-Next.webp)
Story Highlights
* Coinbase is deepening its Solana strategy.
* Coinbase now lets users trade any Solana token through a built-in DEX.
* The update gives traders instant access to new on-chain assets and gives builders immediate reach.
[Coinbase](https://coinpedia.org/exchange/about-coinbase-exchange/)dropped a major update at Solana Breakpoint that changes how traders access the ecosystem.
[Advertisement](https://coinpedia.org/advertising/)[](https://bit.ly/4qIkEoO)
The exchange will now let users trade**any Solana token**directly inside the Coinbase app through a built-in[DEX](https://coinpedia.org/d

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a 'shattering monolithic wall' as the Semantic Anchor because it directly visualizes the headline 'Tears Down Listing Walls' and the core concept of Coinbase removing its gatekeeper status. The breach in the wall reveals a network of light, representing the Solana ecosystem and the new 'liquidity bridge'. For the homepage, I integrated the text 'ANY TOKEN' as a holographic projection emerging from the breach. This text highlights the most significant user benefit – instant access to every on-chain asset – and presents it diegetically within the high-tech, revolutionary scene.
visual_idea.description: A colossal, monolithic wall of polished, Coinbase-blue obsidian dominates the frame, symbolizing the old, permissioned system. This wall is shattering in a dramatic, slow-motion explosion. From the massive breach in the center, a torrent of vibrant, Solana-green and purple fiber-optic light and data streams floods forward, forming a bridge toward the viewer. Within the glowing energy of the breach, the words 'ANY TOKEN' appear as a shimmering, unstable holographic projection. In the deep background behind the wall is darkness, while the foreground is illuminated by the liberating light of the new network.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A colossal, monolithic wall of polished, reflective Coinbase-blue obsidian dominates the vertical frame, its surface gleaming with ultra-detailed texture. This monumental structure, symbolizing the old, permissioned system, is dramatically shattering in a slow-motion explosion. Massive cracks spiderweb across its surface, and fragments of obsidian are suspended in the air. From a gargantuan, jagged breach in the exact center of the wall, a torrent of vibrant, Solana-green and electric purple fiber-optic light and data streams violently floods forward, extending towards the viewer like an energetic, illuminated bridge. Within the intense, glowing energy of this breach, the words 'ANY TOKEN' manifest as a shimmering, unstable holographic projection, flickering with raw power. The deep background behind the shattering wall is enveloped in absolute darkness, creating a stark high-contrast chiaroscuro effect, while the foreground is brilliantly illuminated by the liberating, colorful light emanating from the new network. Emphasize epic scale and height, with significant negative space at the top to convey grandeur. The lighting is dramatic, with intense volumetric light from the breach cutting through the darkness. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, photorealistic, cinematic lighting, high dynamic range, intricate reflections, explosion effects, volumetric lighting, dramatic shadow play, 3:4 aspect ratio.

Glowing green and purple light spills over the smooth, dark surfaces, highlighting the moment the barrier is broken. No text is visible in this close-up view.

The scene showcases an extreme textural contrast between the sharp, cold, fractured edges of a highly polished, dark obsidian wall and intensely bright, chaotic Solana data streams. These holographic data streams erupt dynamically from within the cracks in the obsidian, manifesting as vivid glowing green and purple light. This luminous light spills voluminously over the smooth, dark, reflective surfaces of the polished obsidian, dramatically highlighting the exact moment the barrier is broken. The entire composition is rendered with an extreme high-contrast chiaroscuro effect, creating deep, dramatic shadows that sharply contrast with razor-sharp highlights, emphasizing every microscopic detail of the fractured obsidian and the luminous, volumetric data streams. Intense rim lighting traces the contours of the rupture, defining the breach against the surrounding darkness. The polished obsidian reflects the glowing green and purple light with subtle, warm amber reflections. The composition is perfectly symmetrical, centrally focused, and tightly framed, ensuring the entire 1:1 square aspect ratio is filled with intricate texture and dynamic light, with no visible text. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, cinematic contrast, realistic materials, volumetric lighting.

editorial.headline: Coinbase Tears Down Listing Walls with Native Solana DEX Trading
editorial.standfirst: The exchange removes its gatekeeper status, granting 100 million users instant access to every on-chain Solana asset. This pivot to a 'CEX-like DEX' model signals a massive liquidity bridge for ecosystem builders.
key_takeaways: No Listing Required: Any Solana token with sufficient liquidity is now tradable on Coinbase immediately, bypassing the traditional asset listing committee.
Fiat-to-DeFi Rails: The integration allows users to buy on-chain assets using USD, bank transfers, and debit cards within the standard Coinbase interface.
Strategic Roadmap: Citing its Utopia acquisition, Coinbase confirmed it is 'doubling down' on Solana, with a deeper product showcase scheduled for December 17.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
In a move that fundamentally alters the market structure for Solana assets, **Coinbase** has effectively dissolved the barrier between its massive retail user base and the permissionless on-chain economy. During a product keynote at **Solana Breakpoint 2025**, Product Lead **Andrew Allen** announced the rollout of native DEX trading, a feature that allows users to trade *any* Solana token immediately upon launch, provided it has sufficient liquidity. This eliminates the notorious "listing lag" that has historically separated institutional and retail access to high-velocity on-chain assets.

The implications for builders and issuers are profound. Previously, access to Coinbase's liquidity required a lengthy, opaque listing process. Now, the exchange is acting as a seamless interface for the Solana blockchain itself. As demonstrated by engineer **Sabs Sachdeva**, the user experience is indistinguishable from standard centralized trading: users can execute buy orders for long-tail assets using **USDC** or fiat rails like bank transfers, with complex backend logic handling routing, slippage, and on-chain execution invisibly. This "CEX-like DEX" experience unifies holdings, displaying Bitcoin alongside obscure Solana meme coins in a single portfolio view.

This product launch serves as a tangible signal of Coinbase's "all-in" strategy on Solana. Sachdeva explicitly cited the company's **Utopia** acquisition as a cornerstone of this pivot, framing the integration not just as a feature update, but as an institutional commitment to the ecosystem. By abstracting away the complexities of wallet management and bridging, Coinbase is positioning itself not as a gatekeeper, but as the primary liquidity aggregator for the Solana network.

For those seeking early access, the exchange has opened a waitlist exclusively for Breakpoint attendees. The broader market should mark their calendars for **December 17**, when Coinbase plans to unveil the full scope of its Solana roadmap at a dedicated product showcase. As the lines between centralized and decentralized finance blur, this integration suggests the "Coinbase Effect" is no longer a discrete event, but a permanent state for the Solana ecosystem.
